name: cursor-good
description: Inline interactive feedback panel for Cursor IDE — replaces the interactive-feedback-mcp popup with a native in-editor input view. Features: multi-line text input, image paste support (Ctrl+V), predefined option buttons, and Ctrl+Enter to send.

cursorFeedback.port.description: Local HTTP port for bridging the MCP server and this extension.

cursorFeedback.pollTimeoutSeconds.description: Seconds to wait for user reply before returning a WAITING response to keep the MCP connection alive. Lower values are safer against Cursor client timeouts.

scripts.package: npx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies && mv ../history/cursor-good-*.vsix ../history/back/ 2>/dev/null; mv cursor-good-*.vsix ../history/ && cd .. && git commit -ma 'release: cursor-good'
